name: Free Tax Prep LA
description: Free tax preparation unlocking refunds Angelenos leave unclaimed
benefit_formula: Average combined refund accessed via VITA sites

name: EITC via Free Tax Prep
description: Federal EITC plus CalEITC for qualifying low-income filers
benefit_formula: Average combined federal and state EITC for qualifying filer

name: Metro LIFE Program
description: 20 free Metro rides per month via FamilySource enrollment

name: Metro GoPass
description: Free unlimited monthly Metro pass for young Angelenos

name: LADWP Lifeline Reimbursement
description: Monthly utility reimbursement for seniors and customers with disabilities

name: ULA Emergency Rental Assistance
description: One-time emergency rental assistance for renters facing eviction

name: FamilySource Center Services
benefit_formula: Estimated annual value of case management and navigation

name: Youth Service Corps
description: Paid public service employment for young Angelenos
benefit_formula: Average annual wage from program data

name: Right to Counsel
description: Free legal representation for renters facing eviction

name: Housing Choice Voucher
description: Federal housing voucher covering rent gap
benefit_formula: Annual rent minus 30% of annual income (floored at zero)

name: House Our Vets
description: Full housing placement and services for unhoused veterans
benefit_formula: Annual value at median LA rent

name: Summer Lunch Program
description: Free meals for children during summer months
benefit_formula: 180 days x $3.33 per meal per child
